name: Journey Build Narrative
description: Create DEs, journeys, and visualization outputs with deterministic replay.

script.text: Create DEs and a journey for high-intent checking prospects.

script.title: Data Extensions Created
script.text: DE_Prospects_Intent and DE_OfferEligibility generated with mapped field sets.
I built a three-step journey: qualification, personalized offer, and follow-up optimization.

script.title: Visualization Generated
script.text: Projected conversion lift: 18%. Time-to-launch reduced from 14 days to 4 days.
